div1.entryFree: Accoutrement, dress, equipage: not only in the simple office of love, but in all the a., complement and ceremony of it, Wiv. IV, 2, 5. point-device in your --s, As III, 2, 402. I can change these poor --s, Shr. III, 2, 121. in habit and device, exterior form, outward a. John I, 211.
